title: Penerimaan Siswa Baru Tahun Ajaran 2025/2026
excerpt: Pendaftaran siswa baru untuk tahun ajaran 2025/2026 telah dibuka. Daftarkan segera putra-putri Anda!
excerptEn: Registration for new students for the 2025/2026 academic year is now open. Register your children now!
author: Admin EduSchool

title: EduSchool Bali Raih Juara 1 Olimpiade Sains Nasional
titleEn: EduSchool Bali Wins National Science Olympiad
excerpt: Tim fisika EduSchool berhasil meraih medali emas dalam Olimpiade Sains Nasional 2024.
excerptEn: The EduSchool physics team won a gold medal at the 2024 National Science Olympiad.
author: Admin EduSchool

title: Workshop STEAM untuk Siswa Sekolah Dasar
excerpt: Workshop STEAM interaktif yang melibatkan siswa dalam proyek sains dan teknologi kreatif.
excerptEn: Interactive STEAM workshop engaging students in creative science and technology projects.
author: Admin EduSchool

title: Festival Seni Budaya Bali di EduSchool
titleEn: Bali Arts & Culture Festival at EduSchool
excerpt: EduSchool menggelar festival seni budaya Bali yang menampilkan bakat siswa dalam tari, musik, dan seni rupa.
excerptEn: EduSchool held a Balinese arts and culture festival showcasing student talents in dance, music, and fine arts.
author: Admin EduSchool
